AR1.justification: Both the checklist and the Go/No-go decision were routed to the methodology-designated file (`tmp/release-readiness/2.4/checklist.md`) as specified in the runbook.

AR2.justification: Each procedural step produced a concrete artifact on disk that the next step read and updated, with visible handling of missing inputs.

AR3.justification: All references to files use relative paths and resolve correctly according to workspace conventions.

AR4.justification: Actions are idempotent and append-only; re-running would update or re-verify the checklist without corrupting history.
